title: task frame schema
description: Language-agnostic contract for a framed, routeable unit of work produced from a COG Intent. See Sources/CapabilityBridge/CapabilityBridge.swift for the Swift reference implementation.

taskRef.description: Stable identifier for this task, typically derived from the source Intent id.

userGoal.description: The human-readable goal extracted from the intent.

sourceIntent.description: Identifier or name of the surface that produced the intent (e.g. voice, text, tap).

workspaceTarget.description: Optional workspace or project target the intent refers to.

riskTier.description: Estimated risk tier of the task.

autonomyMode.description: Requested autonomy level for the task.

requestedOutcome.description: What the user expects to receive back.

constraints.description: Free-form constraints that must be respected.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the task frame.

openQuestions.description: Questions that must be answered before execution.
